message.content:
To recreate the Instagram carousel slides pixel-perfect, use a **1080x1920px** canvas (standard vertical Instagram format) with a **black background (#000000)**. Below are exact design specs for each slide, including text content, typography, positions, and decorative elements:


### **Slide 1: Chapter 01**
#### **Background & Decorative Elements**  
- **Top-right white circle**: 30% of canvas width (324px), positioned at **x: 70% (756px), y: 0% (0px)** (top-right corner).  
- **Bottom-left white circle**: 25% of canvas width (270px), positioned at **x: 0% (0px), y: 75% (1440px)** (bottom-left corner).  

#### **Text Content & Typography**  
- **Title**: "CHAPTER 01"  
  - Font: Bold sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Bold**).  
  - Font size: 12% of canvas height (230.4px).  
  - Letter spacing: 0.05em.  
  - Alignment: Centered.  
  - Position: **x: 50% (540px), y: 25% (480px)** (centered horizontally, 25% from top).  
  - Underline: 2px white line, spanning 80% of title width (432px), positioned **y: 30% (576px)** (10px below title baseline).  

- **Bullet Points** (4 items, left-aligned):  
  - Font: Regular sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Regular**).  
  - Font size: 5% of canvas height (96px).  
  - Letter spacing: 0.02em.  
  - Bullet style: White filled circle (●), 8px diameter, positioned **x: 10% (108px), y: 40% (768px)** (first bullet).  
  - Line spacing: 1.5x font size (144px between lines).  
  - Text positions (x: 15% (162px), y: relative to bullet):  
    1. "Search for low-competitive niche" → **y: 40% (768px)**  
    2. "Ensure if the niche has demand of products" → **y: 55% (1056px)**  
    3. "Find a Unbeatable Product" → **y: 70% (1344px)**  
    4. "Ask someone nearby who has knowledge about that product" → **y: 85% (1632px)** (truncated to fit canvas, adjust y to 80% (1536px) if needed).  


### **Slide 2: AI Automated Dropshipping System**
#### **Background & Decorative Elements**  
- **Top-right white circle**: 30% of canvas width (324px), positioned at **x: 70% (756px), y: 0% (0px)**.  
- **Bottom-left white circle**: 25% of canvas width (270px), positioned at **x: 0% (0px), y: 75% (1440px)**.  
- **White dots** (scattered, 15 total):  
  - Diameter: 4px.  
  - Positions (x%, y%):  
    (5, 10), (15, 15), (25, 20), (35, 25), (45, 30), (55, 35), (65, 40), (75, 45), (85, 50), (95, 55), (10, 60), (20, 65), (30, 70), (40, 75), (50, 80).  

#### **Text Content & Typography**  
- **Main Title**: "AI AUTOMATED DROPSHIPPING SYSTEM"  
  - Font: Bold sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Bold**).  
  - Font size: 10% of canvas height (192px).  
  - Letter spacing: 0.1em.  
  - Alignment: Centered.  
  - Position: **x: 50% (540px), y: 35% (672px)** (centered horizontally, 35% from top).  

- **Subtitle**: "IN 7 DAYS ONLY"  
  - Font: Regular sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Regular**).  
  - Font size: 4% of canvas height (76.8px).  
  - Letter spacing: 0.05em.  
  - Alignment: Centered.  
  - Position: **x: 50% (540px), y: 55% (1056px)** (centered below main title).  

- **Underline**: 3px white line, spanning 70% of subtitle width (378px), positioned **y: 60% (1152px)** (10px below subtitle baseline).  


### **Slide 3: Save to Start**
#### **Background & Decorative Elements**  
- **Top-right white circle**: 30% of canvas width (324px), positioned at **x: 70% (756px), y: 0% (0px)**.  
- **Bottom-left white circle**: 25% of canvas width (270px), positioned at **x: 0% (0px), y: 75% (1440px)**.  
- **White dots** (scattered, 15 total):  
  - Diameter: 4px.  
  - Positions (x%, y%):  
    (5, 10), (15, 15), (25, 20), (35, 25), (45, 30), (55, 35), (65, 40), (75, 45), (85, 50), (95, 55), (10, 60), (20, 65), (30, 70), (40, 75), (50, 80).  

#### **Text Content & Typography**  
- **Main Title**: "SAVE TO START"  
  - Font: Bold sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Bold**).  
  - Font size: 10% of canvas height (192px).  
  - Letter spacing: 0.15em.  
  - Alignment: Centered.  
  - Position: **x: 50% (540px), y: 40% (768px)** (centered horizontally, 40% from top).  

- **Subtitle**: "FOLLOW FOR MORE"  
  - Font: Regular sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Regular**).  
  - Font size: 4% of canvas height (76.8px).  
  - Letter spacing: 0.1em.  
  - Alignment: Centered.  
  - Position: **x: 50% (540px), y: 55% (1056px)** (centered below main title).  

- **Underline**: 3px white line, spanning 70% of subtitle width (378px), positioned **y: 60% (1152px)** (10px below subtitle baseline).  


### **Key Notes for Precision**  
- **Font Consistency**: Use the same sans-serif family (e.g., Montserrat) for all slides to maintain visual harmony.  
- **Color**: All text and decorative elements use **white (#FFFFFF)**.  
- **Alignment**: Center text blocks horizontally; left-align bullet points.  
- **Scaling**: Adjust font sizes/positions proportionally if using a different canvas size (e.g., 720x1280px) to preserve ratios.  
- **Dot Placement**: For slides 2 and 3, distribute dots randomly but evenly to mimic a "starfield" effect—avoid clustering.  

These specs will ensure a pixel-perfect recreation of the original design.
